idea: Run a discovery-call script based on The Mom Test to validate the retainer offer.
action_item: Build and pilot a Mom-Test discovery-call script for Move Mi retainer prospects.
business_use_case: Higher-converting, better-validated retainer offers for Move Mi.
implementation_plan: Roll out if it lifts close rate
revenue_hypothesis: A validated discovery script lifts retainer close rate by 5 points, ~$3k MRR.
test_plan: A/B the new script vs current
dashboard_card: Discovery script pilot — close rate vs baseline
operating_manual: Move Mi Discovery Call SOP: open with rapport, ask about the last move, surface pain, confirm budget, propose retainer.
